title: Queue and pickup lane pinch the barista path
summary: The service lane between the counter, pickup shelf, and closest center table is narrow. Customers waiting near pickup intersect the barista route during the busiest middle window.

evidence.summary: Opening window already shows 4 staff/customer crossings and 13s of queue obstruction.
Middle window peaks at 7 crossings, 18s queue obstruction, and 0.74 congestion score.
Later window remains elevated with 6 crossings and table detour score 1.5.
